title: Lumi Light Led Headband Ultra Bright 230° Adjustable Headlight with Motion Sensor, 7 Lighting Modes & IPX4 Head Torch for Camping, Running, Fishing Lumilight Head Torch
features: ﻿Versatile lighting modes Lumi Light Led Headband: The Lumilight head torch rechargeable offers 7 different lighting modes to suit your needs. With options including high and low brightness levels for both COB white light and red light, as well as a high brightness mode for XPE white light, this headlamp provides a wide range of lighting options.

Durable and reliable: Made with high-quality materials, including silicone, the head torch rechargeable Lumi Light Led Headband is built to last. It can withstand the rigors of outdoor adventures and daily use, ensuring that you have a reliable and long-lasting headlamp for all your activities.

Waterproof design: The IPX4 waterproof rating ensures that the head torch is protected against splashing water from any direction. Whether you're camping, fishing, or running in the rain, you can rely on this headlamp to keep shining bright.

Quick charging capability: With its rechargeable battery, this headlamp Lumi Light Led Headband offers fast charging for convenience. Say goodbye to constantly buying and replacing batteries, and enjoy the ease of simply plugging in and recharging whenever needed.

Perfect gift idea: The Lumilight head torch rechargeable comes in a beautifully designed package, making it an ideal gift for outdoor enthusiasts. Whether you're giving it to a friend, family member, or colleague, they'll appreciate the thoughtful and practical nature of this gift.
description: Product Description Hands-Free Motion Sensor ActivationBody With the built-in motion sensor, simply wave your hand near the headlamp to turn it on or off. No need to fumble with buttons, making it super convenient for outdoor activities like camping, hiking, or fishing, especially when your hands are occupied. Fast Charging with Type-C InterfaceBody Equipped with a Type-C charging port, this headlamp supports fast and convenient charging. You can easily recharge it using common Type-C cables, ensuring you spend less time waiting and more time enjoying your outdoor adventures. Ultra-Lightweight at Just 70GBody Weighing a mere 70 grams, this headlamp is incredibly lightweight. You'll barely feel it on your head, providing comfortable wear even during long hours of use. Perfect for outdoor enthusiasts who want bright lighting without the burden of heavy gear.
